data.body: Stack submit hit merge conflict (main advanced; module-size-ceilings.txt + config.py + docs/env-vars.md). Rebased onto new origin/main: resolved ceilings (reconcile.py 1093, config.py 869=main's 840 base +36c7's ~29), regenerated docs/env-vars.md fresh, config.py auto-merged clean. Both Change-Ids preserved (I01f85f8, Id3d839f). 53 targeted tests green. Re-pushing rebased stack for fresh votes.
